top_signals.title: Indonesia Says Export Agency Will Focus on Price, Not Trading
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s commodity export agency will focus on monitoring the price of key raw-material exports instead of intervening in trade, according to a senior official, in an apparent effort to ease industry concerns over a radical natural-resource policy introduced last month.
